statement.en: Exponential stabilization of two coupled linear Korteweg-de Vries equations

proposer: Youssef Khalifeh, Ihab Haidar, J.P. Barbot

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or recent) in control theory for coupled KdV systems. The core mathematical claims (exponential stabilization via boundary control) are formally sound in principle, but peer review status is unknown. The work is a constructive theorem in partial differential equations with control-theoretic applications—inherently TRUE in its mathematical domain if proofs are correct, but FLOWING pending publication validation.

ramanujanFormula.latex: e^{-\lambda t} \left( u_1^2 + u_2^2 + \int (u_1 u_2)_x \, dx \right)
ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 二つの波が絡み合いながら、指数的に静寂へ消えていく。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの波動が螺旋を描きながら、中心の点へ吸い込まれていく。
